content:
🚀 koharu | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated, local-first manga translation with ML-powered features and editable export options.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic detection of text regions, speech bubbles, and cleanup masks • OCR for manga dialogue, captions, and other page text • Inpainting to remove source lettering from the page • Translation with local or remote LLM backends
📖 Summary: Koharu is a Rust-based desktop application that automates the process of translating manga. It leverages machine learning models for text detection, OCR, inpainting to remove original text, and translation via LLMs, all running locally for privacy. The application supports advanced text rendering and offers features like layered PSD export for further editing.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ systeminformer | C
🎯 Primary Use Case: Advanced system monitoring, process management, and debugging on Windows.
✨ Key Features: • Detailed system activity overview with highlighting • Resource hog and runaway process tracking via graphs and statistics • File usage identification • Network connection monitoring and management • Real-time disk access information
📖 Summary: System Informer is a free, open-source Windows utility for monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware. It provides detailed insights into system activity, process management, network connections, and file usage, offering a more advanced alternative to the default Task Manager.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ FadCam | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a versatile and privacy-conscious multimedia recording tool for Android devices, enabling various recording scenarios from background surveillance to screen capture and live broadcasts.
✨ Key Features: • Background video recording • Screen recording • Live streaming • Remote camera control • Ad-free and open-source
📖 Summary: FadCam is an open-source, ad-free Android application designed for multimedia recording. It offers advanced features such as background video recording, screen recording, live streaming capabilities, and remote camera control, all while prioritizing user privacy.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 openhuman | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, locally-run AI assistant that can manage tasks and information without relying on external cloud services for core functions.
✨ Key Features: • Private and local AI • Simple and powerful interface • Managed services integration • Local memory management
📖 Summary: OpenHuman is a personal AI superintelligence designed for private, local use. It aims to be simple yet powerful, acting as an AI harness that prioritizes user control and local memory.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 react-doctor | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated code review and quality assurance for React applications, identifying potential bugs and bad practices before they become major issues.
✨ Key Features: • Deterministic code scanning for React issues • Covers state & effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility • Works with all React frameworks and libraries (Next.js, Vite, React Native, etc.)
📖 Summary: React Doctor is a tool that deterministically scans React codebases to identify issues related to state and effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility. It works across various React frameworks and libraries and can be integrated into development workflows via CLI, CI, or coding agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
